input.topic: Soft-launch corpus review — incident batch 3/6: 2025-2026 ransomware and extortion cluster

candidate_data.review_scope: schema compliance, technical accuracy, historical accuracy, actor linkage, source quality

input.notes:
Review the scoped live incident articles against the latest Astro schema in `site/src/content.config.ts`, the ratified private specs, and primary-source technical and historical evidence.

Scoped files:
- chipsoft-ransomware-dutch-healthcare-2026.md
- die-linke-qilin-ransomware-2026.md
- docketwise-immigration-data-breach-2026.md
- dragonforce-ransomware-campaign-april-2026.md
- foster-city-ransomware-2026.md
- marks-spencer-scattered-spider-2025.md
- passaic-county-medusa-ransomware-2026.md
- ummc-medusa-ransomware-2026.md
- vivaticket-ransomhouse-2026.md
- winona-county-ransomware-2026.md

Required outcome:
- correct schema drift, source drift, section drift, ATT&CK mapping issues, attribution overreach, and factual inaccuracies
- ensure actor linkage, ransomware naming, and cluster boundaries are historically defensible
- if any live article must be removed, merged, or reclassified, create a follow-on pipeline reprocess task before merge so the content is not lost

preconditions: Work from a dedicated review branch and keep changes scoped to the batch unless a shared validator or schema fix is required.
Queue follow-on reprocess tasks for any article that must be removed, merged, or reclassified.
